name: VaultFront
currentFocus: Session 74 saturated integrity arc complete: 11 newly verified findings, all 23 cumulative audit entries, and all 3 innovations shipped across server authority, runtime health, release truth, and executable evidence.
nextMilestone: Provision a real staging origin and collect the external launch-evidence corridor: three distinct human Alpha Gate sessions, Brevo delivery, native Obelisk auth, live web/theme proof, revenue observation, and founder approval.
entropyMethod: Studio protocol entropy: context freshness, truth/IGNIS age, SIL skip pressure, stale human-action labels, and task-bucket pressure.

testingSurfaces.label: Unit and server regression
testingSurfaces.purpose: Vitest core, client, server, and Studio protocol coverage. All 122 files / 762 unique tests pass; the 25-file / 90-test server subset also passes independently in Session 74.

testingSurfaces.label: Production build
testingSurfaces.purpose: TypeScript no-emit plus warning-free Vite 7 production bundle, Release Evidence Manifest, and exact gzip/Brotli initial-entry plus media budgets.

testingSurfaces.label: E2E smoke
testingSurfaces.purpose: Playwright desktop/mobile homepage, settings, manifest, health, environment, and solo-flow smoke. All 22 tests pass with two bounded local workers; CI remains single-worker.

testingSurfaces.label: Local game server
testingSurfaces.purpose: Client and worker stack for manual match, tournament, and HUD checks.

releaseGates: authenticated evidence from at least three distinct human alpha sessions
live CSP/HSTS/Core Web Vitals and theme screenshot evidence
